conferences.notes: Duke wins second consecutive ACC Tournament title. Cameron Boozer named ACC Player of the Year and Tournament MVP (13 pts, 8 reb, 8 ast in final). Isaiah Evans led with 20 pts (4-of-8 from 3). Duke didn't score from the floor in final 2:49 but held on. Virginia's Ugonna Onyenso set ACC Tournament record with 21 blocks over 3 games, shattering Tim Duncan's 31-year record of 14. Duke played with 7-man rotation due to Caleb Foster (foot fracture, surgery) and Patrick Ngongba II (foot soreness) injuries. Malik Thomas had 18 pts for Virginia.

semifinal_results: No. 1 Arizona def. No. 5 Iowa State (semifinal)
conferences.notes: Arizona completes regular-season and tournament championship double. Built 15-point lead with 14:04 to go before Houston went on 14-0 run. Brayden Burries had 21 pts, Koa Peat 21 pts, Jaden Bradley (Big 12 POY) 13 pts. Joseph Tugler had 20 pts/10 reb for Houston. Jaden Bradley hit a buzzer-beater in the semifinal to beat Iowa State. Iowa State's three-peat bid denied.

semifinal_results: No. 3 Arkansas def. No. 15 Ole Miss (OT)
quarterfinal_results: No. 15 Ole Miss upset No. 2 Alabama
conferences.notes: Arkansas's first SEC Tournament title since 2000. John Calipari's first SEC title since 2018 (at Kentucky). Darius Acuff Jr. (SEC Player of the Year) had 30 pts/11 ast in final — first player in SEC Tournament history with 30+ pts and 10+ ast. Trevon Brazile added 16 pts/9 reb with clutch plays. Arkansas won 3 games in 3 days (Oklahoma, Ole Miss, Vanderbilt). UPSET: Vanderbilt routed No. 1 Florida 91-74 in semis, leading for final 29 minutes. Ole Miss's Cinderella run as 15-seed ended in semis. Florida's semifinal loss is notable — crashed out after being projected as a 1-seed.

quarterfinal_results: No. 1 Michigan def. No. 8 Ohio State
No. 4 Illinois lost to No. 5 Wisconsin
No. 6 UCLA def. No. 3 Michigan State
conferences.notes: UPSET: 7-seed Purdue won 4 games in 4 days (Rutgers, Northwestern, Illinois, UCLA, Michigan) to win first Big Ten Tournament title since 2023. Braden Smith had 14 pts/11 ast in final. Oscar Cluff had 21 pts. Michigan's Yaxel Lendeborg (Big Ten POY) had 20 pts/4 threes. Purdue jumped from projected 3-seed to 2-seed. Denied Michigan back-to-back tournament titles.

semifinal_results: No. 1 St. John's def. No. 4 Seton Hall
conferences.notes: St. John's wins second consecutive Big East Tournament under Rick Pitino (age 73). Zuby Ejiofor: 18 pts, 9 reb, 7 blocks (record for most blocks in Big East title game). Ejiofor named Tournament MOP, also won Big East POY, DPOY, and Scholar-Athlete of the Year. Wire-to-wire win for third consecutive day. Led by as many as 20 points. UConn (29-5) was blown out in rubber match. Georgetown's Cinderella run (11-seed, 16-17 record) ended in semis vs UConn. Seton Hall's at-large/auto-bid hopes ended in semis.
conferences.venue: Madison Square Garden, New York, NY

conferences.notes: Utah State completed regular-season and tournament championship double. MJ Collins Jr. (Tournament MVP) led with 20 pts. Mason Falslev had 16 pts/6 ast/4 reb. Drake Allen 13 pts/6 reb/3 ast. Garry Clark 11 pts/6 reb off bench. SDSU's Reese Dixon-Waters had 20 pts, Magoon Gwath 12 pts/8 reb. Third MW postseason title in 8 years, 11th in program history. SDSU's NCAA Tournament hopes in jeopardy after loss.
conferences.venue: Thomas & Mack Center, Las Vegas, NV

semifinal_results: No. 1 South Florida def. No. 5 Charlotte
conferences.notes: South Florida's first NCAA Tournament appearance since 2012. No. 1 seed USF dominated No. 2 Wichita State. Wes Enis led with 19 pts. Tulane had upset Memphis 81-69 earlier in tournament.

VCU wins second straight A-10 Tournament title, clinching auto-bid and NCAA Tournament berth. Nyk Lewis had 17 pts/11 reb. Reserves Terrence Hill Jr. (14 pts) and Michael Belle (12 pts) contributed. Javon Bennett led Dayton with 14 pts. VCU's 21st March Madness appearance. Dayton (23-11) misses NCAA Tournament. VCU was on bubble — tournament win critical for inclusion.

STUNNING UPSET: 3-seed Penn defeats 1-seed Yale in OT. TJ Power scored Ivy Madness-record 44 pts (14-of-26 FG, 7-of-14 from 3). Power hit two 3-pointers in final 6.7 seconds of regulation to force OT — game-tying shot with 1 second left. First 3-seed to win 8-year-old event. Penn beat 2-seed Harvard in OT in semis too. Program's 25th NCAA Tournament appearance, first since 2018. Yale's Trevor Mullin had 22 pts.
conferences.venue: Newman Arena, Cornell University, Ithaca, NY

conferences.notes: Akron wins third straight MAC Tournament title. Tavari Johnson (MAC's leading scorer at 20.2 PPG) led the effort. Notable: undefeated Miami (OH) at 31-0 was upset by UMass 87-83 in first round — nation's only unbeaten team falls.

Kennesaw State's first-ever Conference USA championship. Jaden Harris led with 18 pts, Amir Taylor added 17. Held Louisiana Tech to under 31% shooting. Second-ever NCAA Tournament trip (first since 2023-24). Overcame season of adversity.

UMBC's first America East title since 2018. DJ Armstrong Jr. (Tournament MOP) scored 33 pts, going 9-of-11 from the field with championship-game record 7 three-pointers. Jose Roberto Tanchyn had game-high 10 reb. Ace Valentine added 13 pts. UMBC on 12-game win streak. Third conference tournament title in program history. Ended with a 26-8 run.
conferences.venue: Chesapeake Employers Insurance Arena, Baltimore, MD

conferences.notes: Howard placed four players in double figures. Bryce Harris, Cam Gillus, and Ose Okojie each scored 14 pts. Harris named Tournament Most Outstanding Player. Coach Kenneth Blakney named Outstanding Coach. Third MEAC title in last four seasons under Blakney. First NCAA Tournament since 2024.

UPSET: 8-seed Prairie View A&M defeats 3-seed Southern. Lance Williams scored 18 pts. Cory Wells added 15 pts. Dontae Horne had 15 pts including two late layups to seal it. Southern trailed the entire game but pulled within 68-66 with 24 seconds left. Third SWAC title for Prairie View, first since 2019. Lowest seed to win since 8-seed Texas Southern in 2023. First NCAA Tournament since 2019.

California Baptist erased 7-point deficit. Dominique Daniels Jr. hit decisive three-pointer. Program's first WAC Tournament title and first NCAA Division I Tournament appearance. Utah Valley missed tying alley-oop at the buzzer. Utah Valley's second straight championship game loss.

No. 2 seed Hawaii defeats No. 1 seed UC Irvine. Johnson led with 22 pts and named Tournament Most Outstanding Player. Second Big West championship in program history, first since 2016. Hawaii's final Big West tournament (program moving conferences).
27th consecutive NCAA Tournament appearance. Final WCC tournament before move to Pac-12. From March 13 report.
First NCAA Tournament appearance since 1994. From earlier report.
Back-to-back Big South titles; second consecutive NCAA Tournament. From earlier report.
First NCAA Tournament appearance since 2016. From earlier report.
First NCAA Tournament appearance in program history. From earlier report.
First NCAA Tournament appearance since 2019. From earlier report.
Back-to-back Sun Belt titles; fourth NCAA Tournament in program history. From earlier report.
First NCAA Tournament appearance since 2023; upset over No. 1 seed ETSU. From earlier report.
LIU clinched auto-bid in semifinals because Mercyhurst is not NCAA tournament eligible. From earlier report.
First NCAA Tournament appearance since 2001; coach Speedy Claxton emotional postgame. From earlier report.
First NCAA Tournament appearance since 2022. From earlier report.
First NCAA Tournament appearance since 2010. From earlier report.
Third straight Southland championship. From earlier report.
First NCAA Tournament appearance since 2012. From earlier report.
First NCAA Tournament appearance since 1990; stunning 36-year drought ended. From earlier report.

key_storylines: ALL 31 AUTO-BIDS DECIDED: Selection Sunday field is set. Arkansas and Purdue clinched final auto-bids on March 15.

DUKE locks No. 1 overall seed with ACC Tournament title (74-70 over Virginia). Won with 7-man rotation due to Foster/Ngongba injuries. Cameron Boozer won both ACC POY and Tournament MVP — 20th player in ACC history to earn both.
ARIZONA sweeps Big 12 regular season + tournament title (79-74 over Houston). Jaden Bradley buzzer-beater in semifinal. Solidifies No. 1 seed.
ARKANSAS wins first SEC title since 2000 under John Calipari. Darius Acuff Jr. (30 pts/11 ast) set SEC Tournament record. Beat Oklahoma, Ole Miss, Vanderbilt in 3 days.
FLORIDA CRASHES OUT: No. 1 seed Florida destroyed 91-74 by Vanderbilt in SEC semis. Was projected as a 1-seed — this loss could drop them.
PURDUE UPSET: 7-seed Purdue wins Big Ten Tournament, beating Michigan 80-72 in final. Won 4 games in 4 days. Jumps from 3-seed to 2-seed projection.
ST. JOHN'S dominates: 72-52 rout of UConn in Big East final. Zuby Ejiofor's 7 blocks set Big East title game record. Rick Pitino, age 73, wins back-to-back.
PENN'S TJ POWER: 44-point Ivy Madness record. Hit two 3s in final 6.7 seconds to force OT vs Yale. First 3-seed to win Ivy tourney. Penn's first NCAA bid since 2018.
PRAIRIE VIEW A&M: 8-seed upsets 3-seed Southern 72-66 for SWAC title. Lowest seed to win since Texas Southern in 2023.
MIAMI (OH) HEARTBREAK: 31-0 going in, lost to UMass 87-83 in MAC first round. Akron won third straight MAC title instead.
CAL BAPTIST makes first-ever DI NCAA Tournament via WAC title (63-61 thriller over Utah Valley).
VCU clinches NCAA bid by winning A-10 Tournament (was on bubble). Second straight A-10 title.
Georgetown's Cinderella run (16-17 record, 11-seed) ended in Big East semis vs UConn.
Ole Miss 15-seed SEC run: beat Texas, Georgia, Alabama before falling to Arkansas in semis.
Virginia's Ugonna Onyenso set ACC Tournament record with 21 blocks in 3 games, shattering Tim Duncan's 31-year record.

1_seed_implications.duke: Locked as No. 1 overall seed. ACC regular season + tournament champion. 31-3 despite playing shorthanded.
1_seed_implications.arizona: Locked as 1-seed. Big 12 regular season + tournament champion. Dominant resume.
1_seed_implications.michigan: Likely 1-seed despite Big Ten Tournament final loss to Purdue. Big Ten regular season champion.
1_seed_implications.florida: 1-seed status in jeopardy after 91-74 semifinal blowout loss to Vanderbilt. May drop to 2-seed. UConn could leapfrog.

in_via_auto_bid: VCU (A-10 champion — was on bubble, now safe)
South Florida (AAC champion — first bid since 2012)
California Baptist (WAC champion — first DI bid ever)
bubble_teams_eliminated: Seton Hall (lost Big East semifinal — at-large hopes dead)
Georgetown (lost Big East semifinal — 16-17 record, never had at-large case)
San Diego State (lost MW final to Utah State — bubble in jeopardy)
Dayton (lost A-10 final to VCU — misses NCAA Tournament at 23-11)
bubble_impact.no_bid_stealers: All major conference tournament champions were already projected in the field. No true bid-stealers from power conferences.
